column2: Use arrows or number keys to move
column3: 使用方向鍵或數字鍵移動

Press ENTER to choose from a menu,
column3: 按 ENTER 選擇選單項目，

column2: or ESC to return to the game.
column3: 或按 ESC 返回遊戲。

column2: Some menu choices list a function key
column3: 有些選單項目列出功能鍵

column2: (For a good time, call the author!)

column3: 將操縱桿指向想要的方向

column2: Press top button to use the menus.
column3: 按上面的按鈕開啟選單。

column2: Press other button to see the status
Put cursor where you want Larry to
column3: 將游標放在你想讓 Larry
去的地方，然後點擊按鈕。

column2: Press right button to use menus.
Press left button in the window
Press any key to return to game.
Congratulations, you've broken the bank. This casino has a limit of $250.00 per person, and you've reached it. No more for you, Larry!
column3: 恭喜！你贏翻了。\n這家賭場每人最多贏 $250.00，\n你已經到頂了。沒你的份了，Larry！

column2: You know, the traffic here is really a killer! You should forget about crossing these streets!
column3: 聽著，這兒交通真要人命！\n你別想著過馬路了！

column2: Vowing to hold your breath forever, you enter this miserable excuse for public transportation.
column3: 你發誓要忍著呼吸，\n踏進這台破得不像話的大眾運輸。

column2: Look out! Here he comes again!
Obviously, he thinks you're a fire plug.
column3: 顯然他把你當成消防栓。

column2: Dogs like that make you want to keep moving.
column3: 這種狗讓你只想快點走。

column2: I can't wait all day, bub!
You'll not ride with me again!
After all he's done for you?
He presently smells quite bad, although still better than you.
column3: 他現在臭得要死，\n不過還是比你好聞。

column2: You'd better get out of the street first.
Thousands of cars stream past, just below the edge of your screen.
column3: 數千輛汽車呼嘯而過，\n就在你螢幕邊緣下方。

column2: It smells like an old cab.
Isn't it funny how there's so little traffic?
column3: 奇怪啦，怎麼交通這麼少？

column2: The glow of the city lights obliterate the stars.
column3: 城市燈光的光芒淹沒了星星。

column2: As you bend over to do so, his bare teeth convince you otherwise.
column3: 當你彎下腰時，\n他露出的牙齒讓你改變主意。

column2: You shinny up the pole, read the sign, and come right back down.
column3: 你爬上竿子，讀了標誌，\n然後馬上爬下來。

column2: There is a sign on the pole.
Congratulations, you've broken the bank! This casino has a limit of $250.00 per person, and you've reached it. No more for you, Larry!
column3: 恭喜！你贏翻了。\n這家賭場每人最多贏 $250.00，\n你已經到頂了。沒你的份了，Larry！
